data.title: Top 3 Risk Off Stocks Which Could Rescue Your Portfolio This Quarter
ESMA Pushes For Stronger Crypto Regulations Under MiCA Framework
data.description: ESMA calls for changes to MiCA regulation to enhance regulatory oversight in EU's crypto market, highlighting need for tighter standards and cybersecurity checks for service providers.

data.title: Meta Confirms Layoffs Across Instagram, WhatsApp And Reality Labs Amid Strategic Reshuffle
data.description: Meta Platforms Inc. has confirmed layoffs across several teams, including Reality Labs, Instagram, and WhatsApp, as part of a strategic reallocation of resources to align with its long-term goals.

data.title: Asia Down, Europe Gains; Crude Oil Steady As Investors Eye Middle East Developments - Global Markets Today While Us Slept
data.description: Dow Jones hits record high, U.S. exports and imports decrease, most sectors on S&P 500 increase, Asia markets mixed, commodities remain steady.

data.title: Alcoa Beats Q3 EPS Expectations, Rides Alumina Price Surge Despite Production Hiccups
data.description: Alcoa reports Q3 results, missing sales consensus, alumina production down and aluminum production up sequentially. Adjusted EBITDA and EPS exceed consensus, declares dividend, maintains 2024 outlook, plans strategic cooperation agreement for San Ciprián facilities.
